creator: sec@42.org
text:
Hi,

On Fri, Sep 23, 2011 at 18:50 +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/p5-Protocol-WebSocket,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/160949 has just been submitted.

looks fine from my POV. Thanks for submitting.

CU,
    Sec
-- 
I didn't say we *can't* do it. In fact we can. We also can calculate digits
of sqrt(2) in the background, drive space shuttles, or have an AI algorithm
write poems in Swahili while inside the pager.      -- daia@stoilow.imar.ro
